ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the event took place */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline of the event (e.g., Sitting, Track and Field) */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., group, knockout) */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round (e.g., Preliminaries, Final Round) */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes about the event */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "date" TEXT /* Specific date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Detailed type of event (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_discipline FOREIGN KEY ("discipline") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the discipline (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's country */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Primary discipline of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the event */,
  "pts" TEXT /* Points scored by the athlete or team in the event */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Description of the athlete's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "athlete_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner of the event */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up in the event */,
  "third_place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-place finisher in the event */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_runner_up_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_third_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_place_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medal_counts" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Number of gold medals won by the country */,
  "silver" INTEGER /* Number of silver medals won by the country */,
  "bronze" INTEGER /* Number of bronze medals won by the country */,
  "total_medals" INTEGER /* Total medals won by the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, athlete) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Discipline of the event (e.g., Sitting, Track and Field)
